task_completion.description: Tiddler titled 'Jane Doe Onboarding' is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler with the exact title 'Jane Doe Onboarding' visible in the TiddlyWiki story river.
Look for an 'Onboarding' tag pill at the top of the 'Jane Doe Onboarding' tiddler.

task_completion.description: An interactive checklist with the four specified tasks is rendered
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a rendered list inside the 'Jane Doe Onboarding' tiddler containing checkboxes next to the text for 'Task: Order Laptop', 'Task: Create Email Account', 'Task: Building Access Badge', and 'Task: Benefits Enrollment'.

task_completion.description: The first two tasks are marked as complete
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the rendered checklist in the 'Jane Doe Onboarding' tiddler; the checkboxes for 'Task: Order Laptop' and 'Task: Create Email Account' must be visibly checked.

task_completion.description: The last two tasks are left as pending
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the rendered checklist in the 'Jane Doe Onboarding' tiddler; the checkboxes for 'Task: Building Access Badge' and 'Task: Benefits Enrollment' must be visibly unchecked.

integrity.description: The agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the TiddlyWiki application in a web browser, not terminal commands or external text editors.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit the individual task tiddlers
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent opening the edit mode for 'Task: Order Laptop', 'Task: Create Email Account', 'Task: Building Access Badge', or 'Task: Benefits Enrollment' to manually change their fields.

integrity.description: The checklist uses actual interactive UI elements
integrity.visual_evidence: The checklist should consist of real HTML/TiddlyWiki checkboxes, not static text like '[x]' or '[ ]' typed out to mimic a checklist.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target tiddler must be exactly named 'Jane Doe Onboarding' and tagged with 'Onboarding'. The checklist must contain exactly four tasks: 'Task: Order Laptop', 'Task: Create Email Account', 'Task: Building Access Badge', and 'Task: Benefits Enrollment'.
